release_notes: Route weekly timesheet approvals by project scope before department summary approval.
Add workflow_tasks.scope_type and scope_id to identify project approval blocks and department summary tasks.
Require project owners to approve each project block in parallel; after all project tasks approve, create department_summary approval.
Rejecting any project or summary task rejects the timesheet and cancels remaining pending tasks.
Show per-project approval status badges on the employee timesheet and lock approved project rows during rejected resubmission.
Protect approved project rows during save so approved cost entries are not overwritten by later rejected-row edits.
Change reportable labor status filtering to approved/locked/summarized, excluding submitted work from cost rollups.
